headline: 暑期档预热：新片潮来袭，经典续作领跑
headlineEn: Summer Movie Season Heats Up with Sequels and New Releases
summary: 今日无新片上映，但本周《痴迷》与《穿普拉达的女王2》领跑热搜。《小黄人与大怪兽》等新片即将登场，暑期档竞争激烈。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'Obsession' and 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' top trending this week. Upcoming titles like 'Minions and Monster' signal a competitive summer season.

industryHighlights.text: 《小黄人与大怪兽》本周上映，动画片市场再添新军。
industryHighlights.en: 'Minions and Monster' hits theaters this week, adding to the animation lineup.

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇》等未来档期影片预告引期待。
industryHighlights.en: Upcoming films like 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' generate buzz.

industryHighlights.text: 暑期档竞争白热化，续集电影占据热搜半壁江山。
industryHighlights.en: Summer box office heats up as sequels dominate trending lists.
